Progression.NoEligibleAssets: No eligible assets found for this award.
Progression.NoLostAssets: No lost assets found to restore.
Progression.ChatSaved: Saved for later — open the Progression Log to activate when ready.
Progression.FlexibleDeploymentsActive: Flexible Deployments is now active for this turn. Each Resource asset may be assigned to up to two POIs.
Progression.SupplyNextTurn: Priority Supply will increase by {amount} at the start of the next campaign turn.
Progression.ChatReminder: {description} Apply the effect manually in the Campaign Tracker or on the asset sheet.
Progression.AssetResourceLimitReached: {name} has already reached its assignment limit for this turn.

Desc.shipRefit: One Ship asset may increase any one Power below 14 by +1.
Desc.favorOwed: Can be spent during an RPG session to obtain a benefit from an important individual.
Desc.allyGained: One free additional d20 on a single conflict.
Desc.lullFighting: Select any Military threat and reduce the Intensity by 1 (to a minimum of 1).
Desc.shipUpgrades: Every Ship asset may increase the lowest Power rating by +1. Player choice in the event of a draw.
Desc.trainingCourse: One Character asset may increase any one Power below 14 by +1.
Desc.reconfiguration: A Ship asset of choice may reduce any one Power rating by 1 and increase another Power rating by 1.
Desc.emergencyAid: During any encounter where a Ship or Character was committed, generate a random Resource asset and commit it immediately.
Desc.damageControl: Ignore a roll on the Ship Loss table.
Desc.adaptingCircumstances: Any one Ship or Character asset of choice may increase one Power rating by +1.
Desc.flexibleDeployments: For an entire campaign turn, each Resource may be used twice, rather than once.
Desc.miraculousEscape: Ignore a roll on the Character Loss table.
Desc.focusedResources: A Resource asset of choice increases all Power ratings by +1.
Desc.priorityAssignments: Next turn, increase Supply Priority by +1.
Desc.reviewingForces: The players may discard any assets of choice then roll new ones of the same class (Ship, Character, Resource).

Settings.TablePoiTypeHint: UUID of the main Point of Interest Type rollable table (determines the category).
Settings.TableTacticalThreatHint: UUID of the Tactical Threat sub-table. Results should contain POI actor UUIDs.
Settings.TableExplorationHint: UUID of the Exploration sub-table. Results should contain POI actor UUIDs.
Settings.TableRoutineHint: UUID of the Routine sub-table. Results should contain POI actor UUIDs.
Settings.TableUnknownHint: UUID of the Unknown sub-table. Results should contain POI actor UUIDs.
Settings.TableAssetCharacterHint: UUID of the Character assets sub-table. Results should contain actor UUIDs.
Settings.TableAssetShipHint: UUID of the Ship assets sub-table. Results should contain actor UUIDs.
Settings.TableAssetResourceHint: UUID of the Resource assets sub-table. Results should contain actor UUIDs.
Settings.WorldCampaignTrackerHint: The UUID of the Campaign Tracker actor that serves as the world's primary campaign tracker.
Settings.PrimaryPowerModeHint: How the primary power is chosen when converting actors to assets.
Settings.TableEventsHint: UUID of the Events rollable table used during the Campaign Turn Wizard.
Settings.TableEscalationHint: UUID of the Escalation rollable table. Rolled during Phase 3 for unresolved Tactical Threats at Intensity 2 or 3.

Wizard.Title: Campaign Turn Wizard
Wizard.LockedBy: This wizard is currently in use by {user}. Override?
Wizard.Phase1Step1Hint: Generate a number of Points of Interest equal to the campaign Pace. Select one to play as your in-character scenario.
Wizard.Phase1Step2Hint: Assign assets to Points of Interest by dragging them from the sidebar onto the POI slots.
Wizard.Phase1Step2Guidance: Drag assets from the sidebar to the Primary and Assisting slots on each Point of Interest.
Wizard.Phase1Step3Hint: One randomly selected Point of Interest will encounter an event this turn.
Wizard.GMPreparingPois: The GM is preparing Points of Interest for this turn. Please stand by.
Wizard.Phase2Step1Hint: Resolve conflicts for each POI with assigned assets. The scenario POI is skipped (it will be played out in-character).
Wizard.Phase2Step2Hint: Review the momentum gained from conflict outcomes and update the campaign momentum as needed.
Wizard.Phase2Step3Hint: Complete any remaining consequence rolls and note any assets lost or commandeered this turn.
Wizard.Phase2MomentumNone: No conflicts were resolved this turn.
Wizard.Phase3StepHint1: Review each POI card. Roll escalation for urgent threats, and roll to determine which asset is commandeered for routine POIs.
Wizard.Phase3StepHint2: Enter any roleplay bonus earned this turn, then roll on the progression table if you have 5 or more points available.
Wizard.Phase3StepHint3: Add reinforcement assets using the + buttons in the asset sidebar until your Priority Supply is met.
Wizard.Phase3StepHint4: Review what will happen when the turn ends, then click Finish Campaign Turn.
Wizard.Phase1aHint: Generate a number of Points of Interest equal to the campaign Pace. You may generate randomly or create custom POIs.
Wizard.Phase1bHint: Assign assets to Points of Interest and choose one POI to play as an in-character scenario.
Wizard.Phase1bGuidance: Use the Campaign Tracker sheet to drag and drop assets onto POI slots. Click the star icon on a POI to designate it as your in-character scenario.
Wizard.Phase1bStep1: Drag assets from the asset lists to the Primary and Assisting slots on each POI.
Wizard.Phase1bStep2: Click the star icon on a POI to mark it as the scenario (played in-character).
Wizard.Phase1bStep3: When ready, click Next in the tracker's progress bar to continue.
Wizard.Phase1cHint: Roll on the Events table for each Point of Interest to apply random events.
Wizard.Phase2Hint: Resolve conflicts for each POI with assigned assets. The scenario POI is skipped (it will be played out in-character).
Wizard.Phase3Hint: Review outcomes of the campaign turn: remove resolved POIs, increase urgency on threats, and handle progression.
Wizard.GeneratePoi: Roll for Random Point of Interest
Wizard.NoScenarioWarning: No scenario POI selected. Are you sure you want to continue?
Wizard.NoPoisForEvent: No Points of Interest available to roll an event for.
Wizard.EventsRolledSummary: {user} rolled events for {count} Point(s) of Interest.
Wizard.EventTableNotConfigured: Events table not configured in module settings.
Wizard.ConsequenceExtraPoi: Generate 1 additional POI next campaign turn
Wizard.ConsequenceRollLoss: Roll for a Loss (Character or Ship asset)

LossOutcome.CharMIADesc: The character is lost — dead, captured, or their fate is unknown.
LossOutcome.CharInjuredDesc: The character is unavailable next campaign turn while recovering from their wounds.
LossOutcome.ShipLostAllHandsDesc: The ship and any Character assets assigned to the same mission are lost.
LossOutcome.ShipBeyondRecoveryDesc: The ship is lost, but much of the crew survived. Add +1 to a single Power rating on another ship as the crew are transferred.
LossOutcome.ShipDamagedDesc: The ship is unavailable next campaign turn, as it must undergo repairs.
LossOutcome.ShipMinorDesc: The ship is available next game turn.

Wizard.NoConflictsToResolve: No conflicts to resolve — no POIs have assigned assets (excluding the scenario).
Wizard.Urgency3Placeholder: Tactical threats at urgency 3+ — additional consequences (coming soon).
Wizard.UnresolvedRoutine: Unresolved Routine POIs — consequences coming soon.
Wizard.UnresolvedExploration: Unresolved Exploration POIs — consequences coming soon.
Wizard.UnresolvedUnknown: Unresolved Unknown POIs — consequences coming soon.
Wizard.EscalationTableNotConfigured: Escalation table not configured in module settings.
Wizard.ProgressionTableNotConfigured: Progression table not configured in module settings.
Wizard.StartTurnFirst: Start a campaign turn before activating this award.
Wizard.OutcomeCatastrophe: Catastrophic escalation — removed from play. Pace increased by 1.
Wizard.OutcomeAssetUnavailableEvent: Unavailable for {turns} campaign turn(s) due to event.
Wizard.OutcomeUnknownRemoved: Trouble brewing — removed. Generate an additional POI next turn at +1 Difficulty.
Wizard.DeleteResolvedPoiConfirm: The following resolved POI actors will be permanently deleted from the world, along with any tokens on the current scene:
Wizard.ResourceCannotBePrimary: Resource assets cannot be the primary asset in a conflict.
Wizard.CancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this campaign turn? All wizard progress will be lost.
Wizard.OutcomesUnconfirmedWarning: {count} POI outcome(s) have not been confirmed or ignored. Unconfirmed outcomes will be auto-applied. Continue?
